title: bidens sandvicensis var. setosa
intro: Bidens sandvicensis var. setosa, also known as Setosabidion or Setosabidens, is a plant species that belongs to the Bidens genus. It is a type of flowering plant native to Hawaii, and its medicinal properties have been utilized for centuries in traditional Hawaiian medicine. The plant is rich in saponins and flavonoids, which are known to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Bidens sandvicensis var. setosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support immune function.
